channel.title: Libs on Hengist
channel.description: Recent content in Libs on Hengist

item.title: Link Load and Libs reading notes
item.description: Chap I Chap II Preprocessing gcc -E src.c -o src.i This operation did several things. processing all the instructions begin with ‘#’, delete all of them except ‘#pragma’, and process the ‘#include’ recursively. delete all comments. add line number and file name identifiers Compile to assembly code gcc -S src.i -o src.s # or gcc -S src.c -o src.s # or ccl src.c Assembly to machine code as src.s -o src.
